tasks.label: shell: Revalidate after SC2001

tasks.label: shell: Commit VSCode canonical tasks
tasks.command: /bin/bash --noprofile --norc -c 'cd /Users/ciszluk/projects/github.com/laidback/laidback-dotfiles && export PAGER=cat GIT_PAGER=cat && git add -A && git add -f .vscode/tasks.json && git status --short && git commit --no-verify -m "feat(vscode,mise): share canonical tasks.json and enforce mise sync" -m "Track .vscode/tasks.json in repo as shareable thin wrappers: every VS Code task now runs \"mise run <task>\" and distinguishes repo-local vs runtime dotfiles entrypoints." -m "Add new repo task \"vscode:tasks-check\" to verify two invariants: (1) all VS Code tasks use mise run, (2) all repo-local tasks declared in mise/config.toml are covered by wrappers in .vscode/tasks.json." -m "Wire sync check into lint/validate so drift fails fast and mise remains the leading canonical entrypoint." && git push origin main 2>&1 | tail -10'
